memoryAudit.method: same-session baseline heap usage -> 3 scroll/nav/wait cycles -> forced Runtime.gc/HeapProfiler.collectGarbage after each cycle -> final heap snapshot summary

findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark condition not separately captured in this batch.
findings.suggestedFix: Declare color-scheme support and provide a usable dark theme via prefers-color-scheme or light-dark().

principles.summary: Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.

findings.title: Substantial page chrome/network noise
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 368 requests; script hosts include cjs.ltwebstatic.com, count.shein.com, armor.ltwebstatic.com, sc.ltwebstatic.com, common.ltwebstatic.com, bat.bing.com, www.googletagmanager.com, dynamic.criteo.com.
findings.suggestedFix: Prioritise core content and defer or remove distracting ads, trackers, popups, and non-essential chrome.

findings.title: Mobile viewport has horizontal overflow
findings.suggestedFix: Add/repair viewport-aware responsive CSS so all content fits within the mobile visual viewport without horizontal scrolling.

principles.summary: Primary homepage entry point rendered; task completion flow not exercised.
LCP above good threshold (6.3s); Total blocking time is high (1299ms); CLS above good threshold (0.98)

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (6.3s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

findings.title: Total blocking time is high (1299ms)
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce main-thread JavaScript by splitting, deferring, and removing non-critical third-party work.

findings.title: CLS above good threshold (0.98)
findings.suggestedFix: Reserve space for late-loading media/ads and avoid inserting content above existing content after render.

principles.summary: axe found 2 violation groups; Unnamed controls or links detected

findings.title: axe found 2 violation groups
findings.evidence: axe violations: image-alt(critical,1 nodes), region(moderate,7 nodes)
findings.suggestedFix: Fix the reported axe violations with semantic HTML, valid ARIA, accessible names, labels, and sufficient contrast.

findings.title: Unnamed controls or links detected
findings.suggestedFix: Give every interactive control/link a visible label or accurate accessible name.

findings.title: Lighthouse best-practices score 54
findings.suggestedFix: Review Lighthouse best-practices failures and fix console errors, deprecated APIs, unsafe patterns, and browser compatibility issues.

findings.title: Lighthouse SEO score 85
findings.suggestedFix: Fix Lighthouse SEO failures such as crawlable links, metadata, status codes, and indexable content.

findings.title: Large third-party/network surface
findings.suggestedFix: Audit third-party scripts/requests and remove, defer, or sandbox anything not essential to the core task.

principles.summary: Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.
html lang='en'; deeper locale flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Heavy transfer on initial load (3.8 MB)

findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (3.8 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 368 requests and 3800396 transferred bytes.
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce initial bytes by compressing assets, lazy-loading non-critical media, and removing unused scripts.

principles.summary: No issue found in this batch evidence.
Same-session memory pass retained -18.3 MB after interaction cycles and forced GC; no monotonic leak signal above threshold.

verdict: Homepage batch: 9 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-fast-and-stable: LCP above good threshold (6.3s); medium be-fast-and-stable: Total blocking time is high (1299ms); high be-fast-and-stable: CLS above good threshold (0.98).
_caveats: Scale batch includes Lighthouse, trace, HAR, layout, screenshots, discoverability, axe/probes, and reduced-motion video; INP still requires a dedicated interaction flow.
Memory pass/fail requires rigorous_memory_pass.mjs; coarse heap snapshots are retained but not treated as pass/fail.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Memory was rechecked with same-session baseline, 3 interaction cycles, forced GC, and final heap snapshot; still a homepage smoke test, not full memlab trace attribution.
